title: The Snake Girl and the Silver-Haired Witch
writer: Kimiyuki Hasegawa, Kazuo Kozu, Kazuo Umezu
actors: Yûko Hamada, Sachiko Meguro, Yachie Matsui
plot: After years at a Catholic orphanage, a young girl's life takes an unexpected turn when her long-absent father suddenly appears to reclaim her.
